items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any specific details or outcomes related to the scenario of waiting for sold-out group events. While the expected result mentions confirming behavior or producing a failure report, there are no traces or snapshots captured that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the waitlist mechanism, leading to an inconclusive result regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
